arts.ttl: Team News: Chelsea vs. Tottenham Hotspur injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Thursday's Premier League clash between Chelsea and Tottenham Hotspur.

arts.ttl: Something has to give – Ange Postecoglou wants solution to packed calendar
arts.sum: Tottenham are one of several clubs to have struggled with injuries this season after juggling multiple competitions.

arts.ttl: Erin Cuthbert makes it an SFWA award double as Chelsea star named top Scot yet again
arts.sum: Cuthbert's had a brilliant season for her country and has been recognised in style

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou takes confident stance on Tottenham sack threat with bullish response
arts.sum: The daggers are still out for under-fire Ange Postecoglou as Tottenham bid to make something out of a dismal season - but he is adamant he is unfazed by speculation about his job

arts.ttl: Every word Ange Postecoglou said on Pochettino Tottenham claim, sack pressure, Romero and Chelsea
arts.sum: It’s been a bit unusual not having a game on the weekend which worked well for us because the majority of our international players played so we were able to give them a couple of days to recover post internationals instead of flying straight back which I think was good for them. Postecoglou also gave his thoughts on Mauricio Pochettino's recent comments about a possible return to Spurs, his job, Cristian Romero playing for Argentina during the international break and plenty of other topics.

arts.ttl: Chelsea dressing room's true Enzo Maresca feelings emerge as players made to train on day off
arts.sum: Reece James has shared his thoughts on Chelsea manager Enzo Maresca after he cancelled a players' day off. Every game is going to be a tough battle and we are playing against two rivals in our next games, but I don't think that changes much.

arts.ttl: Spurs team Postecoglou to pick vs Chelsea with Van de Ven and Odobert decisions
arts.sum: Guest's team: Vicario; Porro, Romero, Van de Ven, Spence; Bentancur, Bergvall, Maddison; Odobert, Solanke, Son. Pedro Porro then comes back into the team and that means Djed Spence moves across to the left as Destiny Udogie drops out altogether, with Guglielmo Vicario in goal as ever.

Speaking after making his senior debut, Postecoglou said of the youngsters: "We’ve had quite a few young boys training with the group and obviously with the situation we’re in, it’s allowed them to understand what it takes to even train at this level and Callum’s been great. He’s obviously a very talented young player and he’s one of the ones we’ve got high hopes for.

arts.ttl: Harry Kane saves Daniel Levy for the final time with Tottenham transfer gift as pressure mounts
arts.sum: It is already more than 18 months since Kane left so it can be easily forgotten that the full effect of his £100million transfer is yet to really show. So to this extent, Kane's transfer fills a hole left by Tottenham.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou makes brutally honest Mauricio Pochettino Tottenham return admission
arts.sum: Pochettino said : "When I left the club I remember one interview, I said I would like one day to come back to Tottenham and I'm not going to say now because I'm in USA that I don't want to talk about that. There has been plenty of talk over who could take over in N17 if Postecoglou is relieved of his duties, with former head coach Mauricio Pochettino reiterating his desire to return to Tottenham one day during an interview ahead of the USA's Concacaf Nations League matches in March.
